description: Refactor the 'Hotels' vertex class in the 'demodb' database to use an embedded object for address data. Replace the existing flat 'Street', 'City', and 'Country' properties with a single 'Address' property of type EMBEDDED linked to a new 'Location' Document class (not extending V or E) containing those same fields as Strings. Migrate all existing hotel address data into the new 'Address' field and remove the original properties from the 'Hotels' class. Use OrientDB Studio (http://localhost:2480/studio/index.html) with credentials: root / GymAnything123!.
